name: Nfa Blueberry Muffins
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Skim Milk or Soy Milk
1 t Grated orange or lemon rind
recipeInstructions:
1. Or use powdered egg replacer sufficient to replace 2 eggs.
2. Sift dry ingredients together.
3. Beat eggs in a medium bowl.
4. Add applesauce and milk to the eggs. Combine the liquid and the dry ingredients with a few strokes.
5. Fold into the batter before the dry ingredients are completely moist; add the orange peel and blueberries.
6. Fill well greased muffin pans full and bake in a preheated oven at 400 degrees for 25-30 minutes.
